title: Why Lemons Created the Mafia ?
description:
The origin of the mafia goes back to something unexpected—lemons.

In the 1800s, lemons were extremely valuable because they helped cure scurvy, a deadly disease among sailors.
This created high demand, and with weak law enforcement, local groups began controlling supply and protection.

That is how one of the world’s most powerful crime networks began.
